S.FORM: = Shavkat Mirziyoyev = Mntucing hngkawas 1957 idas 7 jiyax 24 ka Shavkat Mirziyoyev ga, empklaw ka hiya. Bukung klwaan Uzbekistan ta sayang o kiya ka Shavkat Mirziyoyev, pnaah hngkawas 2016 idas 12 jiyax 14 pnrajing kmlawa klwaan.
S.PHON: = sħa*kat miɾ*ijojə* = mntuʦiŋ ħŋkawas **** idas * ɟijax ** ka sħa*kat miɾ*ijojə* ga, əmpklaw ka ħija. bukuŋ klwaan u*bəkistan ta sajaŋ o kija ka sħa*kat miɾ*ijojə*, pnaaħ ħŋkawas **** idas ** ɟijax ** pnɾaɟiŋ kmlawa klwaan.
S.FORM: = Shavkat Mirziyoyev = Mntucing hngkawas 1957 idas 7 jiyax 24 ka Shavkat Mirziyoyev ga, empklaw ka hiya. Bukung klwaan Uzbekistan ta sayang o kiya ka Shavkat Mirziyoyev, pnaah hngkawas 2016 idas 12 jiyax 14 pnrajing kmlawa klwaan.
S.PHON: = sħa*kat miɾ*ijojə* = mntuʦiŋ ħŋkawas **** idas * ɟijax ** ka sħa*kat miɾ*ijojə* ga, əmpklaw ka ħija. bukuŋ klwaan u*bəkistan ta sajaŋ o kija ka sħa*kat miɾ*ijojə*, pnaaħ ħŋkawas **** idas ** ɟijax ** pnɾaɟiŋ kmlawa klwaan.
